esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-cockroachdb.otel-default*
| WHERE service.name == "cockroachdb"
  AND rpc_connection_unhealthy IS NOT NULL
  AND rpc_connection_unhealthy > 0
// > 0 indicates possible network partition
| WHERE attributes.node_id IS NOT NULL AND attributes.store IS NULL
| STATS unhealthy = MAX(rpc_connection_unhealthy) BY attributes.node_id, host.name
| SORT unhealthy DESC
